heading: Preemption
label: 4817 Preemption
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1986section 1631 of Pub. L. 99–198section 4801 of this title

children.heading: Promotion and consumer education; funds from pork producers
children.label: a Promotion and consumer education; funds from pork producers

children.text: promotion and consumer education involving pork and pork products; and
obtaining funds therefor from pork producers.

children.heading: Additional or different State regulation prohibited
children.label: b Additional or different State regulation prohibited
children.text: The regulation of such activity (other than a regulation or requirement relating to a matter of public health or the provision of State or local funds for such activity) that is in addition to or different from this chapter may not be imposed by a State.

children.heading: Application of section
children.label: c Application of section
children.text: This section shall apply only during a period beginning on the date of the commencement of the collection of assessments under and ending on the date of the termination of the collection of assessments under section 4811(a)(3) or 4811(b)(1)(B) of this title.section 4809 of this title1So in original. Probably should be “section 4811(b)(2)(A) or 4812(b)(1)(B)”.1
